a_image.alt: Cyberpop style mood board — Aesthetic · Futuristic Pop

sections.a_eyebrow: Futuristic · Bold Colors · Cute · Playful · Techy
sections.a_description: Neon pastels, bubbly rounded surfaces, and the optimistic vision of a future where technology is cute, colorful, and friendly — Cyberpop merges cyberpunk's tech obsession with pop culture's playful energy. The electric purple accents and soft pink backgrounds create a digital candy shop where AI assistants are adorable and every interface element invites you to tap, swipe, and smile.

This playful-futuristic style powers Gen Z-focused social apps, kawaii tech product pages, neon-lit gaming accessories, and digital collectible platforms. You'll see it on virtual pet apps, colorful VPN marketing pages, LED lighting product sites, and mobile game landing pages — anywhere that wants to signal 'technology is fun' rather than 'technology is serious business.'

The bright, bubbly-futuristic aesthetic of cyberpop — neon pastels, rounded tech surfaces, and the optimistic vision of a future that's cute, colorful, and user-friendly. Background: soft pink (#fff0f5). The .inner panel has a white background (#ffffff) with a playful gradient border effect (2px solid #e040fb) and 20px border-radius — bubbly and rounded like a friendly robot. Colors: electric purple (#e040fb) as the primary accent — the vibrant purple of LED strips and neon signs in a cute candy shop. Dark purple (#2d0a3e) for headings, medium purple-gray (#6a5a7a) for body text. The aesthetic is tech-optimistic and playful — a future where AI assistants are cute, interfaces are pastel, and technology is fun. Set in Exo 2 — a geometric sans-serif with slightly futuristic proportions and friendly rounded terminals. Heading at weight 700, 26px, line-height 1.3, color #2d0a3e. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #e040fb. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.6, color #6a5a7a. Buttons: primary — purple (#e040fb), white text, 50px border-radius (pill). Secondary: transparent, purple border, pill shape. Alternatives: Quicksand (rounded tech), Fredoka (bubbly display).
{What this palette represents — the core identity}
